summary: Iteration 267 - Orbital Hub Widget Navigation Testing Complete. All satellite navigation and Mission Control functionality verified working. User reported 'widgets do not function' - RESOLVED. Testing confirmed: (1) All 6 active satellites navigate correctly on tap (meditation, breathing, mixer, map, mood, theory), (2) Mission Control opens via central orb tap, (3) Mission Control contains all 14 nodes in 2-column grid, 5 Economy & Council items, 4 System items, (4) Navigation from Mission Control to pages works, (5) Dormant satellites visible in Abyss (9 found), (6) All destination pages load with actual content.

minor.issue: 401 errors when session expires - expected behavior for auth-protected endpoints

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All satellite navigation and Mission Control features working

test_credentials.note: Session may expire - pages requiring auth show 'Sign in' prompts

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 267 verified all orbital hub widget navigation. Active satellites (mood, mixer, map, breathing, meditation, theory) all navigate on tap via handleSelect -> navigate(sat.path). Dormant satellites in Abyss navigate on tap via AbyssSatellite handleClick -> navigate(sat.path). Mission Control opens via central orb tap, contains Dashboard/Profile quick actions, 14 satellite nodes in 2-column grid, Economy & Council section (Sovereign Council, Economy & Dust, Academy, Trade Circle, Alchemy Lab), and System section. All pages load with substantial content.

active_satellite_meditation.details: Clicking satellite-meditation navigates to /meditation - 'Stillness Within' page with guided meditations

active_satellite_breathing.details: Clicking satellite-breathing navigates to /breathing - 'Conscious Breathing' page with breathing patterns

active_satellite_map.details: Clicking satellite-map navigates to /cosmic-map - Full map view with coordinates

active_satellite_mood.details: Clicking satellite-mood navigates to /mood - 'Emotional Landscape' with mood tracking grid

active_satellite_theory.details: Clicking satellite-theory navigates to /theory - 'The Conservatory' with Circle of Fifths

mission_control_opens.details: Central orb tap opens Mission Control panel with data-testid='mission-control-panel'

mission_control_quick_actions.details: Dashboard and Profile quick actions present and functional

mission_control_nodes_section.details: All 14 satellite nodes found in 2-column grid: meditation, breathing, soundscape, cosmic-map, mood-engine, conservatory, star-chart, observatory, oracle, journal, games, workshop, zen-garden, botany

mission_control_economy_section.details: All 5 Economy & Council items found: Sovereign Council, Economy & Dust, Academy, Trade Circle, Alchemy Lab

mission_control_system_section.details: All 4 System items found: Book of Changes, Mastery Tiers, Settings, Admin

mission_control_navigation.details: Clicking Meditation in MC navigates to /meditation, clicking Sovereign Council navigates to /sovereigns

dormant_satellites_abyss.details: Long-press on central orb opens Abyss with 9 dormant satellites: star-chart, observatory, oracle, workshop, trade, games, journal, archives, suanpan

page_content_breathing.details: /breathing loads with 'Conscious Breathing' title, breathing patterns (Box Breathing, 4-7-8, etc.)

page_content_theory.details: /theory loads with 'The Conservatory' and Circle of Fifths content

page_content_cosmic_map.details: /cosmic-map loads with full map view and coordinates

page_content_observatory.details: /observatory loads with 'The Observatory' - Orrery, Deep Sky, Live Events tabs

page_content_oracle.details: /oracle loads with 'Seek the Oracle' - Tarot, Astrology, I Ching, Sacred Geometry options

page_content_mood.details: /mood loads with 'Emotional Landscape' - full mood tracking grid with 20+ emotions
